title: Jolly Boxes
description: A mod that adds presents that can spawn around you when you sleep
body:
![Logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/JfUzhKlE/images/acd4d8f5d5e0f672dfb4216299d733a8285c723a.png) 


Jolly Boxes adds Christmas Presents which can be upgraded to yield better rewards.

Sleeping will give you a chance to find some outside in the morning!

Right Clicking them will pick them up, while breaking them will open them for loot!

 

This mod is highly configurable.

Through the use of tags drops can be added by datapacks.
